name: AEON Biopharma, Inc.
business: AEON is a biopharmaceutical company advancing its proprietary botulinum toxin complex ABP-450 as a biosimilar to Botox with the goal of achieving full-label U.S. market entry for debilitating medical conditions. The company focuses on developing ABP-450 for therapeutic indications and holds exclusive development and commercialization rights in the U.S., Canada, EU, UK, and certain other territories.

exposures.sentence: AEON is a biopharmaceutical company advancing its proprietary botulinum toxin complex ABP-450 as a biosimilar to Botox (onabotulinumtoxinA) with the goal of achieving full-label United States ( U.S. ) market entry for debilitating medical conditions.

catalysts.event: BPD Type 2a meeting with FDA to review proposed analytical similarity strategy
catalysts.sentence: We commenced analytical studies in the fourth quarter of 2024 to prepare for a BPD Type 2a meeting with the FDA that was held on January 21, 2026.

catalysts.event: Request BPD Type 2b meeting to discuss next phase of development program
catalysts.sentence: We are currently planning to request a BPD Type 2b meeting in 2026 to discuss the next phase of the development program to support approval of ABP-450 as a biosimilar to Botox across all approved therapeutic indications.

catalysts.event: Complete the majority of analytical comparability program
catalysts.sentence: We believe this feedback provides a clear framework for the remaining analytical components of its biosimilar development program and plans to complete the majority of its analytical comparability program in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. therapeutic botulinum toxin market is approximately $3.3 billion in 2025, projected to grow at 8% annually.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Clarivate Therapeutic Botulinum Toxin Market Insights (2025), the U.S. therapeutic botulinum toxin market is approximately $3.3 billion in 2025, and is projected to grow at an annual growth rate of approximately 8%.
